sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports back pain and stiffness with rotation, but denies leg pain or numbness. He reports a history of lumbar fusion at T4 and a back injury from a twisting motion at a birthday party. He takes ibuprofen for anxiety.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The x-ray shows a healed lumbar fusion at T4 with no significant compression fractures or abnormalities. There is no evidence of pinched nerves or radiculopathy.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are consistent with a lower back strain.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Continue ibuprofen 800mg three times daily with food. Dragon, order the medications and procedures and close out the note.
